sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business maintenance and do not indicate immediate revenue or cost changes.

headlines.headline: Dralol Computing sees 5% drop in new customer orders this quarter

sentiment.reasoning: A decline in new customer orders is a direct negative indicator of near-term revenue performance and demand health.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
